name: lean-ctx
description: Context Runtime for AI Agents — 71 MCP tools, 10 read modes, 95+ shell patterns, tree-sitter AST for 18 languages. Compresses LLM context by up to 99%. Use when reading files, running shell commands, searching code, or exploring directories. Auto-installs if not present.
author: yvgude
summary_zh: 给 AI Agent 用的上下文运行时，通过多种读取模式和语法树解析，把读文件、跑命令、搜代码时灌给大模型的内容压缩到极致，省 token 又提速，适合做智能体开发或本地编码助手。
